dataset: FarmBlock Food Distress Index — Phase 3 (Full Nation)

coverage.notes: KY and PA CDC data returned NO_DATA from provider — will resolve in Phase 3.1 patch

top_new_signals_phase3: SC Allendale County: 71.9% Black, 27.2% poverty, 50.1% hypertension, 46.7% obesity — Deep South signal extends into SC
AZ Apache County: 32.5% poverty, 49.8% no internet — Native American county with near-complete digital exclusion
OK Adair County: 42% no internet, 22.3% poverty, 46.2% obesity — rural OK emerging as distress corridor
WV Boone County: 22% poverty, 48.1% hypertension, 46.7% obesity, 22.4% mental health — Appalachian collapse signal
GA Atkinson County: 27.5% poverty, 42.5% hypertension, 44% obesity — Georgia's rural Black Belt activating
SD Bennett County: 29.6% poverty, 27.3% no internet — Lakota Nation poverty cluster

methodology.fdi_score: Composite 0-100. poverty(25%) + health_burden(25%) + digital_exclusion(20%) + vacancy(15%) + Black_pct(15%)

next: Phase 3.1 — patch KY/PA CDC gaps + run FDI scoring on all 3,144 counties + publish ranked national map
